scores.notes: No actual code shown — only prose/tables describing what was 'created'. From the description: uses legacy install+config-changed events with direct self.unit.status= rather than CollectStatusEvent (valid but not current best practice per scoring notes). Uses older 'bases' charmcraft.yaml format (build-on/run-on, Ubuntu 22.04) rather than the modern 'base'+'platforms' schema (ubuntu@24.04). All required structural elements are described (containers, resources, config option), but the outdated charmcraft schema and absence of actual code make correctness uncertain. The 'bases' format may cause issues with current charmcraft versions.
